headline: McCain ‘to shut New Zealand factory’
summary: The Canada-based frozen-foods group is reportedly set to close one of its two processing facilities in the country.

headline: Keep Kraft Heinz In Your Pantry, Not Your Portfolio
summary: Kraft Heinz stands out among high-dividend packaged food companies with low valuation ratios and high forward yield. Learn more about KHC stock here.
